notes.font_path: Set to an absolute path of a .ttf or .ttc file to override system font detection. Leave null to use auto-detection.
notes.mark_color: GitHub Octocat mark rendered as a low-opacity watermark in the top-left corner.
notes.accent: Top accent line color. Matches GitHub's blue highlight (#58a6ff).
notes.bg_start: Left edge background color. GitHub dark base (#0d1117).
notes.bg_end: Right edge background color. GitHub dark surface (#161b22).
notes.tag_text: Tag pill text color. GitHub accent blue.
